nasb.text: After this Jehoshaphat king of Judah allied himself with Ahaziah king of Israel. He acted wickedly in so doing.

esv.text: After this Jehoshaphat king of Judah joined with Ahaziah king of Israel, who acted wickedly.

cnv.text: 後來，猶大王約沙法和作惡多端的以色列王亞哈謝結盟。

ccb.text: 后来，犹大王约沙法与作恶多端的以色列王亚哈谢修好。
